basic_details.job_title: ICAR CRRI Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR - Central Rice Research Institute, Cuttack
basic_details.short_information: ICAR - Central Rice Research Institute, Cuttack (ICAR CRRI) Project Fellow Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 08/PF/2026-27 on the official website of ICAR CRRI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR CRRI Project Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation as per rule for SC, ST and OBC candidates.

selection_process: Written-cum-personal interview Screening test (if large number of candidates)
